intro: Every feature is a brushstroke. Together they form a masterwork of productivity.

feature_cards.icon: <svg viewBox="0 0 48 48" fill="none"><rect x="6" y="8" width="36" height="32" rx="4" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6"/><line x1="14" y1="18" x2="34" y2="18" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6" stroke-linecap="round"/><line x1="14" y1="26" x2="30" y2="26" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6" stroke-linecap="round"/><line x1="14" y1="34" x2="26" y2="34" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6" stroke-linecap="round"/><circle cx="38" cy="14" r="6" fill="#c9a84e" opacity="0.2"/><path d="M36 14l1.5 1.5 3-3" stroke="#c9a84e" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg>
feature_cards.title: Distraction-Free Editor
feature_cards.description: A clean, minimal writing environment with rich markdown support. No toolbars, no clutter just you and your words.

feature_cards.icon: <svg viewBox="0 0 48 48" fill="none"><rect x="6" y="6" width="36" height="36" rx="4" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6"/><rect x="14" y="14" width="20" height="20" rx="2" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6" opacity="0.4"/><circle cx="24" cy="24" r="4" stroke="#c9a84e" stroke-width="1.6"/><path d="M34 34l6 6" stroke="#c9a84e" stroke-width="1.6" stroke-linecap="round"/></svg>
feature_cards.title: Atomic Organization
feature_cards.description: Break down complex ideas into interconnected atoms. Tag, link, and weave your knowledge into a living web.

feature_cards.icon: <svg viewBox="0 0 48 48" fill="none"><rect x="4" y="12" width="40" height="28" rx="4" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6"/><rect x="10" y="18" width="12" height="8" rx="2" fill="#c9a84e" opacity="0.15" stroke="#c9a84e" stroke-width="1"/><rect x="26" y="18" width="12" height="8" rx="2" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.4"/><circle cx="18" cy="36" r="3" fill="#c9a84e" opacity="0.3"/><circle cx="30" cy="36" r="3" fill="#8b2f3f" opacity="0.3"/></svg>
feature_cards.title: Bidirectional Links
feature_cards.description: Create a second brain with automatic backlinks. Every connection reveals new insights across your knowledge base.

feature_cards.icon: <svg viewBox="0 0 48 48" fill="none"><circle cx="24" cy="24" r="16" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6"/><path d="M24 14v10l6 6" stroke="#c9a84e" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round"/><circle cx="36" cy="12" r="5" fill="#8b2f3f" opacity="0.2"/><circle cx="36" cy="12" r="2" fill="#8b2f3f" opacity="0.5"/></svg>
feature_cards.title: Version History
feature_cards.description: Every edit is preserved. Travel back in time, compare drafts, and never lose a single word you have written.

feature_cards.icon: <svg viewBox="0 0 48 48" fill="none"><path d="M8 36V12l16-8 16 8v24l-16 8-16-8z" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6"/><path d="M24 4v40" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6" opacity="0.15"/><path d="M12 18v12" stroke="#c9a84e" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.6"/><path d="M36 18v12" stroke="#8b2f3f" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.4"/></svg>
feature_cards.title: End-to-End Encrypted
feature_cards.description: Your thoughts are yours alone. Military-grade encryption ensures your notes remain private, always.

feature_cards.icon: <svg viewBox="0 0 48 48" fill="none"><rect x="6" y="10" width="36" height="28" rx="4" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6"/><path d="M16 24l6 6 10-12" stroke="#c9a84e" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/><circle cx="12" cy="34" r="2" fill="#8b2f3f" opacity="0.3"/><circle cx="36" cy="34" r="2" fill="#8b2f3f" opacity="0.3"/></svg>
feature_cards.title: Smart Search and Filter
feature_cards.description: Find anything instantly. Full-text search, tag filters, and AI-powered suggestions surface exactly what you need.
